chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Election Appeal No.22 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For Katcha Peshi. 21.12.2016. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G. -.-.-. Mr. Shakeel Zai, Advocate, files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.1, and informs that the Appellant Rao Wahid Bux has expired on 04.07.2016 in a road accident. This is not disputed by Mr. Imdad Ali, who is associate Advocate of Mr. Noor Ahmed Memon, Advocate, who is representing the appellant. A Statement has also been filed on 17.12.2016 on behalf of Respondent No.4 (Syed Akhtar Hussain) wherein the above factual position has been mentioned. In these circumstances, this Election Appeal has otherwise become infructuous and is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE \Ali Haider
